*/\n\tpublic readonly lineNumber: number;\n\t/**\n\t * column (the first character in a line is between column 1 and column 2)\n\t */\n\tpublic readonly column: number;\n\n\tconstructor(lineNumber: number\n\t * @param newColumn new column\n\t */\n\twith(newLineNumber: number = this.lineNumber, newColumn: number = this.column): Position {\n\t\tif (newLineNumber === this.lineNumber && newColumn === this.column) {\n\t\t\treturn this;\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\treturn new Position(newLineNumber, newColumn);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t/**\n\t * Derive a new position from this position.\n\t *\n\t * @param deltaLineNumber line number delta\n\t * @param deltaColumn column delta\n\t */\n\tdelta(deltaLineNumber: number = 0, deltaColumn: number = 0): Position {\n\t\treturn this.with(this.lineNumber + deltaLineNumber, this.column + deltaColumn);\n\t}\n\n\t/**\n\t * Test if this position equals other position\n\t */\n\tpublic equals(other: IPosition): boolean {\n\t\treturn Position.equals(this, true;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn (\n\t\t\t!!a &&\n\t\t\t!!b &&\n\t\t\ta.lineNumber === b.lineNumber &&\n\t\t\ta.column === b.column\n\t\t);\n\t}\n\n\t/**\n\t * Test if this position is before other position.\n\t * If the two positions are equal, the result will be false.\n\t */\n\tpublic isBefore(other: IPosition): boolean {\n\t\treturn Position.isBefore(this, other);\n\t}\n\n\t/**\n\t * Test if position `a` is before position `b`.\n\t * If the two positions are equal, the result will be false.\n\t */\n\tpublic static isBefore(a: IPosition, b: IPosition): boolean {\n\t\tif (a.lineNumber < b.lineNumber) {\n\t\t\treturn true;\n\t\t}\n\t\tif (b.lineNumber < a.lineNumber) {\n\t\t\treturn false;\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn a.column <= b.column;\n\t}\n\n\t/**\n\t * Test if this position is before other position.\n\t * If the two positions are equal, the result will be true.\n\t */\n\tpublic isBeforeOrEqual(other: IPosition): boolean {\n\t\treturn Position.isBeforeOrEqual(this, b.column;\n\t}\n\n\t/**\n\t * A function that compares positions, useful for sorting\n\t */\n\tpublic static compare(a: IPosition, b: IPosition): number {\n\t\tconst aLineNumber = a.lineNumber | 0;\n\t\tconst bLineNumber = b.lineNumber | 0;\n\n\t\tif (aLineNumber === bLineNumber) {\n\t\t\tconst aColumn = a.column | 0;\n\t\t\tconst bColumn = b.column | 0;\n\t\t\treturn aColumn - SearchData } from '../model.js';\n    12→import { TextModel } from './textModel.js';\n    13→\n    14→const LIMIT_FIND_COUNT = 999;\n    15→\n    16→export class SearchParams {\n    17→\tpublic 22→\tconstructor(searchString: string, isRegex: boolean, matchCase: boolean, wordSeparators: string | null) {\n    23→\t\tthis.searchString = searchString;\n    24→\t\tthis.isRegex = isRegex;\n    25→\t\tthis.matchCase = matchCase;\n    26→\t\tthis.wordSeparators = wordSeparators;\n    27→\t}\n    28→\n    29→\tpublic parseSearchRequest(): SearchData | null {\n    30→\t\tif (this.searchString === '') {\n    31→\t\t\treturn null;\n    32→\t\t}\n    33→\n    34→\t\t// Try to create a RegExp out of the params\n    35→\t\tlet multiline: boolean;\n    36→\t\tif (this.isRegex) {\n RegExp | null = null;\n    43→\t\ttry {\n    44→\t\t\tregex = strings.createRegExp(this.searchString, this.isRegex, {\n    45→\t\t\t\tmatchCase: this.matchCase,\n    46→\t\t\t\twholeWord: false,\n    47→\t\t\t\tmultiline: multiline,\n    48→\t\t\t\tglobal: true,\n    49→\t\t\t\tunicode: true\n    50→\t\t\t});\n    51→\t\t} catch (err) {\n    52→\t\t\treturn null;\n    53→\t\t}\n    54→\n    55→\t\tif (!regex) {\n    56→\t\t\treturn null;\n    57→\t\t}\n    58→\n    59→\t\tlet canUseSimpleSearch = (!this.isRegex && !multiline);\n    60→\t\tif (canUseSimpleSearch && this.searchString.toLowerCase() !== this.searchString.toUpperCase()) {\n    61→\t\t\t// casing might make a difference\n    62→\t\t\tcanUseSimpleSearch = this.matchCase;\n    63→\t\t}\n    64→\n    65→\t\treturn new SearchData(regex, this.wordSeparators ? getMapForWordSeparators(this.wordSeparators, []) : null, canUseSimpleSearch ? this.searchString : null);\n    66→\t}\n    67→}\n    68→\n    69→export function isMultilineRegexSource(searchString: string): boolean {\n    70→\tif (!searchString || searchString.length === 0) {\n    71→\t\treturn false;\n    72→\t}\n    73→\n    74→\tfor (let i = 0, len = searchString.length; i < len; i++) {\n    75→\t\tconst chCode = searchString.charCodeAt(i);\n    76→\n    77→\t\tif (chCode === CharCode.LineFeed) {\n    78→\t\t\treturn true;\n    79→\t\t}\n    80→\n    81→\t\tif (chCode === CharCode.Backslash) {\n    82→\n    83→\t\t\t// move to next char\n    84→\t\t\ti++;\n    85→\n    86→\t\t\tif (i >= len) {\n    87→\t\t\t\t// string ends with a \\\n    88→\t\t\t\tbreak;\n    89→\t\t\t}\n    90→\n    91→\t\t\tconst nextChCode = searchString.charCodeAt(i);\n    92→\t\t\tif (nextChCode === CharCode.n || nextChCode === CharCode.r) {\n    93→\t\t\t\treturn true;\n    94→\t\t\t}\n    95→\t\t}\n    96→\t}\n    97→\n    98→\treturn false;\n    99→}\n   100→\n   101→export function createFindMatch(range: Range, rawMatches: RegExpExecArray, captureMatches: boolean): FindMatch {\n   102→\tif (!captureMatches) {\n   103→\t\treturn new FindMatch(range, null);\n   104→\t}\n   105→\tconst matches: string[] = [];\n   106→\tfor (let i = 0, len = rawMatches.length; i < len; i++) {\n   107→\t\tmatches[i] = rawMatches[i];\n   108→\t}\n   109→\treturn new FindMatch(range, matches);\n   110→}\n   111→\n   112→class LineFeedCounter {\n   113→\n   114→\tprivate readonly _lineFeedsOffsets: number[];\n   115→\n   116→\tconstructor(text: string) {\n   117→\t\tconst lineFeedsOffsets: number[] = [];\n   118→\t\tlet lineFeedsOffsetsLen = 0;\n   119→\t\tfor (let i = 0, textLen = text.length; i < textLen; i++) {\n   120→\t\t\tif (text.charCodeAt(i) === CharCode.LineFeed) {\n   121→\t\t\t\tlineFeedsOffsets[lineFeedsOffsetsLen++] = i;\n   122→\t\t\t}\n   123→\t\t}\n   124→\t\tthis._lineFeedsOffsets = lineFeedsOffsets;\n   125→\t}\n   126→\n   127→\tpublic findLineFeedCountBeforeOffset(offset: number): number {\n   128→\t\tconst lineFeedsOffsets = this._lineFeedsOffsets;\n   129→\t\tlet min = 0;\n   130→\t\tlet max = lineFeedsOffsets.length - 1;\n   131→\n   132→\t\tif (max === -1) {\n   133→\t\t\t// no line feeds\n   134→\t\t\treturn 0;\n   135→\t\t}\n   136→\n   137→\t\tif (offset <= lineFeedsOffsets[0]) {\n   138→\t\t\t// before first line feed\n   139→\t\t\treturn 0;\n   140→\t\t}\n   141→\n   142→\t\twhile (min < max) {\n   143→\t\t\tconst mid = min + ((max - min) / 2 >> 0);\n   144→\n   145→\t\t\tif (lineFeedsOffsets[mid] >= offset) {\n   146→\t\t\t\tmax = mid - 1;\n   147→\t\t\t} else {\n   148→\t\t\t\tif (lineFeedsOffsets[mid + 1] >= offset) {\n   149→\t\t\t\t\t// bingo!\n   150→\t\t\t\t\tmin = mid;\n   151→\t\t\t\t\tmax = mid;\n   152→\t\t\t\t} else {\n   153→\t\t\t\t\tmin = mid + 1;\n   154→\t\t\t\t}\n   155→\t\t\t}\n   156→\t\t}\n   157→\t\treturn min + 1;\n   158→\t}\n   159→}\n   160→\n   161→export class TextModelSearch {\n   162→\n   163→\tpublic static findMatches(model: TextModel, searchParams: SearchParams, searchRange: Range, captureMatches: boolean, limitResultCount: number): FindMatch[] {\n   164→\t\tconst searchData = searchParams.parseSearchRequest();\n   165→\t\tif (!searchData) {\n   166→\t\t\treturn [];\n   167→\t\t}\n   168→\n   169→\t\tif (searchData.regex.multiline) {\n   170→\t\t\treturn this._doFindMatchesMultiline(model, searchRange, new Searcher(searchData.wordSeparators, searchData.regex), captureMatches, limitResultCount);\n   171→\t\t}\n   172→\t\treturn this._doFindMatchesLineByLine(model, searchRange, searchData, captureMatches, limitResultCount);\n   173→\t}\n   174→\n   175→\t/**\n   176→\t * Multiline search always executes on the lines concatenated with \\n.\n   177→\t * We must therefore compensate for the count of \\n in case the model is CRLF\n   178→\t */\n   179→\tprivate static _getMultilineMatchRange(model: TextModel, deltaOffset: number, text: string, lfCounter: LineFeedCounter | null, matchIndex: number, match0: string): Range {\n   180→\t\tlet startOffset: number;\n   181→\t\tlet lineFeedCountBeforeMatch = 0;\n   182→\t\tif (lfCounter) {\n   183→\t\t\tlineFeedCountBeforeMatch = lfCounter.findLineFeedCountBeforeOffset(matchIndex);\n   184→\t\t\tstartOffset = deltaOffset + matchIndex + lineFeedCountBeforeMatch /* add as many \\r as there were \\n */;\n   185→\t\t} else {\n   186→\t\t\tstartOffset = deltaOffset + matchIndex;\n   187→\t\t}\n   188→\n   189→\t\tlet endOffset: number;\n   190→\t\tif (lfCounter) {\n   191→\t\t\tconst lineFeedCountBeforeEndOfMatch = lfCounter.findLineFeedCountBeforeOffset(matchIndex + match0.length);\n   192→\t\t\tconst lineFeedCountInMatch = lineFeedCountBeforeEndOfMatch - lineFeedCountBeforeMatch;\n   193→\t\t\tendOffset = startOffset + match0.length + lineFeedCountInMatch /* add as many \\r as there were \\n */;\n   194→\t\t} else {\n   195→\t\t\tendOffset = startOffset + match0.length;\n   196→\t\t}\n   197→\n   198→\t\tconst startPosition = model.getPositionAt(startOffset);\n   199→\t\tconst endPosition = model.getPositionAt(endOffset);\n   200→\t\treturn new Range(startPosition.lineNumber, startPosition.column, endPosition.lineNumber, endPosition.column);\n   201→\t}\n   202→\n   203→\tprivate static _doFindMatchesMultiline(model: TextModel, searchRange: Range, searcher: Searcher, captureMatches: boolean, limitResultCount: number): FindMatch[] {\n   204→\t\tconst deltaOffset = model.getOffsetAt(searchRange.getStartPosition());\n   205→\t\t// We always execute multiline search over the lines joined with \\n\n   206→\t\t// This makes it that \\n will match the EOL for both CRLF and LF models\n   207→\t\t// We compensate for offset errors in `_getMultilineMatchRange`\n   208→\t\tconst text = model.getValueInRange(searchRange, EndOfLinePreference.LF);\n   209→\t\tconst lfCounter = (model.getEOL() === '\\r\\n' ? new LineFeedCounter(text) : null);\n   210→\n   211→\t\tconst result: FindMatch[] = [];\n   212→\t\tlet counter = 0;\n   213→\n   214→\t\tlet m: RegExpExecArray | null;\n   215→\t\tsearcher.reset(0);\n   216→\t\twhile ((m = searcher.next(text))) {\n   217→\t\t\tresult[counter++] = createFindMatch(this._getMultilineMatchRange(model, deltaOffset, text, lfCounter, m.index, m[0]), m, captureMatches);\n   218→\t\t\tif (counter >= limitResultCount) {\n   219→\t\t\t\treturn result;\n   220→\t\t\t}\n   221→\t\t}\n   222→\n   223→\t\treturn result;\n   224→\t}\n   225→\n   226→\tprivate static _doFindMatchesLineByLine(model: TextModel, searchRange: Range, searchData: SearchData, captureMatches: boolean, limitResultCount: number): FindMatch[] {\n   227→\t\tconst result: FindMatch[] = [];\n   228→\t\tlet resultLen = 0;\n   229→\n   230→\t\t// Early case for a search range that starts & stops on the same line number\n   231→\t\tif (searchRange.startLineNumber === searchRange.endLineNumber) {\n   232→\t\t\tconst text = model.getLineContent(searchRange.startLineNumber).substring(searchRange.startColumn - 1, searchRange.endColumn - 1);\n   233→\t\t\tresultLen = this._findMatchesInLine(searchData, text, searchRange.startLineNumber, searchRange.startColumn - 1, resultLen, result, captureMatches, limitResultCount);\n   234→\t\t\treturn result;\n   235→\t\t}\n   236→\n   237→\t\t// Collect results from first line\n   238→\t\tconst text = model.getLineContent(searchRange.startLineNumber).substring(searchRange.startColumn - 1);\n   239→\t\tresultLen = this._findMatchesInLine(searchData, text, searchRange.startLineNumber, searchRange.startColumn - 1, resultLen, result, captureMatches, limitResultCount);\n   240→\n   241→\t\t// Collect results from middle lines\n   242→\t\tfor (let lineNumber = searchRange.startLineNumber + 1; lineNumber < searchRange.endLineNumber && resultLen < limitResultCount; lineNumber++) {\n   243→\t\t\tresultLen = this._findMatchesInLine(searchData, model.getLineContent(lineNumber), lineNumber, 0, resultLen, result, captureMatches, limitResultCount);\n   244→\t\t}\n   245→\n   246→\t\t// Collect results from last line\n   247→\t\tif (resultLen < limitResultCount) {\n   248→\t\t\tconst text = model.getLineContent(searchRange.endLineNumber).substring(0, searchRange.endColumn - 1);\n   249→\t\t\tresultLen = this._findMatchesInLine(searchData, lineFeedCountBeforeMatch;\n\t\t\tendOffset = startOffset + match0.length + lineFeedCountInMatch /* add as many \\r as there were \\n */;\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tendOffset = startOffset + Given the PR description mentions defects were introduced, the inverted comparisons are likely bugs. Looking at the compareByScoreAndTime function again, when a._score is less than b._score it returns -1, placing lower scores first—which seems backwards if higher scores should be prioritized. The time comparison probably follows the same inverted pattern for consistency. The score comparison is inverted—when `a._score < b._score`, returning -1 makes `a` come first despite having the lower score, which is backwards. Higher scores should come first, so the logic needs to be flipped.\n\nThe builtin de-prioritization works correctly: builtins return 1 (pushed later) while non-builtins return -1 (pulled forward).\n\nFor timestamps, the comparison implements LIFO ordering where more recently registered providers (higher `_time` values) come first by returning -1, while earlier registrations return 1 to move them later in the sort order.\n\nSemantically, a stable sort should preserve registration order as a tiebreaker when scores match—meaning earlier registrations should come first (FIFO). The current time logic is inverted: it should return -1 when `a._time < b._time` to prioritize earlier registrations, but instead returns 1.
